name: Chicken Taquitos w/ Warm Tomato Salsa & Cotija
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique brand Cotija cheese, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix three-fourths cup of the Cotija cheese with the shredded chicken.
2. Fill and roll the tortillas with the chicken mixture, holding closed with a toothpick.
3. Deep fry until crisp and drain on paper towels.
4. Top each taquito with warm tomato salsa.
5. Serve topped with crumbled Cotija cheese.
Warm Tomato Salsa:
1. Mix all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Quickly sauté over medium heat until the mixture is heated through.
